title: Gaming words sprint
text: gg win play game level boss loot raid clan crew rank score chat ping lag pro mvp epic op meta
tips: If you game, these are muscle memory targets
If you don't game, the rhythm still trains you

character_tips.anna: Common gaming words. Short, punchy — perfect speed practice.
character_tips.maxim: Even non-gamers benefit — short words train rhythm.
character_tips.knopych: GAMER MODE ON! 🎮 GG NO RE!
character_tips.klavochka: Words your gamer friends use, my dear 🎲
